problem.summary: Convert a contiguous array-of-structures represented as x/y/z/w float tuples into four structure-of-arrays outputs. The baseline loads scalar fields; the optimized version uses one vectorized float4 load per tuple.
outputs: x[i], y[i], z[i], and w[i] contain the four fields from tuple i
constraints: aos is 16-byte aligned for the optimized float4 path
outputs do not alias aos or each other
n may be any positive element count

verification.method: Harness compares all four SoA outputs against CPU deinterleaving of the AoS input.

curation.notes: No GPU timing has been collected. Keep vectorized-load wins or losses labeled timing-only unless profiler counters are collected.
